Hedyotis diffusa, also known as Hultholia mimosoides, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-diabetic properties. The bioactive constituents of Hedyotis diffusa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Hedyotis diffusa include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
